description_long: This armchair features a plush, light green upholstered seat and backrest with a soft, tufted appearance, giving it a cozy and inviting look. The backrest and seat are generously padded, with visible stitched seams forming a subtle grid pattern across the surface. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing a minimalist and modern silhouette. Its base consists of sturdy, light-colored wooden or painted metal legs with a simple, angular design that provides stability. The overall form is rounded and slightly reclined, enhancing comfort for lounging. This armchair would be well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or contemporary outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, light green tufted armchair with a plush seat and backrest, supported by simple, angular light-colored legs and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, tufted seat and backrest with a soft, inviting surface and no armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, cushioned profile and the slight recline of the backrest, as well as the angular legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded backrest and the full width of the light-colored base frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the plushness and the leg structure.
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, medium-height, tufted with stitched grid pattern
attribute_leg_type: straight, angular, light-colored wooden or painted metal legs
